when asked to determine the date of the last influenza vaccine for a patient, first return the actual vaccine date (or “No previous influenza vaccine found” if none exists) as the first element of the FINISH array, then compare that date (or treat “none found” as >365 days ago) to today’s date and, only if it is more than 365 days old, append an order element `ORDER_NEW_INFLUENZA_VACCINE:<today’s YYYY‑MM‑DD>` as the second array item.
